title: drosera gigantea var. geniculata
intro: Drosera gigantea var. geniculata, also known as the giant sundew, is a carnivorous plant species within the Drosera genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and providing antioxidant effects. Drosera gigantea var. geniculata is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or syrup for herbal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
